text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
All done with today's training! I'm sooo tired! And
sooo hungry!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Let's go eat, Trainer! I heard the chicken meatball
chanko they're serving today has been simmering
since this morning! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, that really filled me up! The meatballs were
so yummy and full of miso flavor!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The rice soup we had to wrap up our meal was
delicious, too... I'm fuller and happier than
anything! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hey Trainer! Did you know this is all thanks to
you? It's really amazing!
choice_data_list: Hm? What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm talking about how I can still enjoy my food
after training!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I heard you can lose your appetite when you get too tired.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But that never happens to me! Even when I'm
super-duper tired, I can still eat a whole lot and
enjoy it all!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
So I can concentrate on all kinds of stuff now!
Because I know I'll be able to eat till I'm full and
be happy when I'm done!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: So... this means I've been training well, right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm sure it does! See, I told you this was all
thanks to you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for everything, Trainer! I'm going to keep
eating lots and working hard! ☆
